target: Quick Practice Mode - YouTube Shorts/TikTok Reels style 3-question sets
summary: Verified the new Quick Practice feature. Backend API /api/question-bank/practice/random correctly returns exactly 3 questions for both reading and listening skills with proper format (text, options/correct, passage for reading, audio_transcript for listening). Frontend displays dark theme card-based UI with progress dots, instant correct/incorrect feedback, Set Complete screen with score and Next Set button, and session tracking. All features tested and working.

features_tested.details: Returns 3 questions with text, type, correct, passage, options fields
Returns 3 questions with audio_transcript field for TTS playback

features_tested.feature: Quick Practice page loads with dark theme
features_tested.details: Dark gradient background (slate-900) with card-based UI

features_tested.feature: Progress dots show 3 dots for 3 questions
features_tested.details: 3 progress indicators visible at top, active dot highlighted

features_tested.feature: Selecting option and clicking Confirm shows instant feedback
features_tested.details: Correct shows green, incorrect shows red with correct answer displayed

features_tested.feature: After 3 questions, Set Complete screen appears
features_tested.details: Shows 'Set Complete!' with X/3 score and Next Set button

features_tested.feature: Next Set button loads 3 new different questions
features_tested.details: Questions are randomized from 1200+ question pool
Shows 'Session: X sets - Y/Z overall (%)' on Set Complete screen

features_tested.feature: Back button navigates to Question Bank page

features_tested.details: Reading passage section visible with passage_title and passage text
Purple audio player section with Listen/Tap to play and loading spinner for TTS

features_tested.feature: Text input shown for completion-type questions
features_tested.details: data-testid='practice-answer-input' shown for form-completion, sentence-completion types
Backend returns different questions across requests (verified in pytest)

seed_data_creation: N/A - Questions sourced from existing Cambridge + AI Academic/General test pools
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Practice feature fully working. Backend serves questions from combined pool (Cambridge IELTS tests + AI Academic Sets A-H + AI General Sets A-D = 1200+ questions). Frontend PracticeMode.js implements Shorts-style 3-question sets with dark theme, instant feedback, and session tracking. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_quick_practice.py for regression testing. Key data-testids: quick-practice, question-card, option-0/1/2/3, confirm-answer-btn, next-question-btn, next-set-btn, set-complete, back-to-qb, play-audio-btn, practice-answer-input, answer-feedback.
